form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 16 at Riccarton Park on April 11 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Dakota carrying 58.5kg at $16.60. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 11 at Riccarton Park on February 18 over 1400m, in the wet; 11 len behind The Arctic Monkey carrying 58.5kg at $35.30. Making headway. Rates highly and likely to figure in the finish.
